examples: The man was brutish and coarse.
His brutish family, usually happy to enjoy the fruits of his thievery—marmalade and a birthday cake filched from someone's shopping bag.
LIFE at the bottom is nasty, brutish and short.
It's one of the most brutish and efficient methods of mining known to man.
Because it is public, it is likely to be nasty, brutish and tiresomely long-winded.
